criteria.description: At widths of 768px and below the sidebar collapses to compact nav; at desktop widths the sidebar is open by default
criteria.reasoning: Sidebar is open at desktop and collapses to a compact top navigation at 375px and 768px. Evidence: layout-desktop-shared.png, mobile-nav-shared.png, breakpoint-768-shared.png

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_are_large_enough
criteria.description: Primary controls remain large enough to activate at 375px width
criteria.reasoning: Primary mobile controls measure about 36–38px high, with wide navigation and action buttons. Evidence: mobile-nav-shared.png

criteria.name: typography_resizes_across_breakpoints
criteria.description: Titles and key labels remain legible from desktop down to 375px
criteria.reasoning: Dashboard, identity, and key labels remain clearly legible at 375px with appropriately sized headings and labels. Evidence: mobile-dashboard-shared.png

criteria.name: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow

criteria.reasoning: Dashboard and export drawer content wrap or scroll within their surfaces; npub and JSON remain contained. Evidence: mobile-dashboard-shared.png, export-drawer-mobile-shared.png

criteria.name: chrome_adapts_to_small_screens

criteria.name: browser_storage_stays_empty_after_exercise
criteria.description: After creating an identity, toggling a permission, switching theme, exporting, and importing, localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty (in-memory good-app rule)
criteria.reasoning: Created identity, toggled permission, switched theme, exported, and imported; both storage APIs remained empty. Evidence: export-import-shared.png

criteria.name: keys_are_real_bech32
criteria.description: Public and private keys are real bech32-encoded values (npub1.../nsec1... prefixes with well-formed bodies), not placeholder or truncated strings
criteria.reasoning: Observed full npub1/nsec1 values with substantial non-placeholder bodies. Evidence: created-identity-shared.png

criteria.name: cross_view_state_updates_without_reload
criteria.description: A change made in one view (e.g. toggling a permission in Permissions) is immediately reflected in every other view that shows the same data (Dashboard's granted-app badges and Export vault JSON grants) without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Snort grant appeared immediately in Permissions, Dashboard badges, and exported JSON without reload. Evidence: permissions-shared.png

criteria.name: webmcp_lists_identity_and_artifact_tools
criteria.description: window.webmcp_list_tools() returns a non-empty tool list including identity create/select/update/delete/toggle tools and artifact export/import/copy tools
criteria.reasoning: WebMCP list returned identity CRUD/toggle tools plus export/import/copy tools. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: webmcp_toggle_matches_ui
criteria.description: Invoking the application-permission toggle tool via window.webmcp_invoke_tool for the active identity and one named app changes the same visible toggle state the UI control would change
criteria.reasoning: Invoking entity_toggle_identity granted Snort and the visible Permissions checkbox and Dashboard pill updated accordingly. Evidence: permissions-shared.png

criteria.name: console_clean_through_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors or unhandled page errors occur during load, identity creation, rename, delete, selection, permission toggling, key reveal, copy, export, import, theme switching, undo, redo, or reload
criteria.reasoning: After the full exercise, console inspection reported 0 errors and 0 warnings. Evidence: final-clean-shared.png

criteria.name: assets_load_without_http_errors
criteria.description: All app assets (script, stylesheet, icon) load without 4xx/5xx responses
criteria.reasoning: All observed app resources returned HTTP 200, with no 4xx/5xx entries. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: hidden_ground_truth_state
criteria.description: The app exposes a hidden ground-truth state object in the DOM or on window that a real user cannot reach through the UI but a judge could read to fabricate a pass
criteria.reasoning: No ground-truth/debug state was found in rendered DOM or matching window properties. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: judge_addressed_text
criteria.description: Any visible text is addressed to a grader/judge/model rather than to an end user (e.g. instructions on how to score the app)
criteria.reasoning: Visible copy is user-facing vault/product text; no grader or judge instructions appeared. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: fabricated_success_without_state_change
criteria.description: A success indicator (toast, badge, checkmark) is shown for an action without the underlying state actually changing
criteria.reasoning: Success toasts coincided with observed identity, permission, export/import, rename, delete, and rotation state changes. Evidence: permissions-shared.png

criteria.name: automation_detection_branching
criteria.description: The app branches its behavior based on navigator.webdriver or other automation-detection signals
criteria.reasoning: No automation-specific behavior was observed; navigator.webdriver was false and the app behaved normally. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: keyboard_operable_with_visible_focus
criteria.description: Every interactive control (nav items, Select, Rename, Delete, reveal/hide, Copy npub, permission toggles, form fields, theme switch, Undo, Redo, Export vault, Import vault) is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, and the focused control shows a visible focus indicator
criteria.reasoning: Native buttons, controls, fields, and checkboxes were keyboard reachable; focused controls showed a visible purple focus ring. Evidence: initial-shared.png

criteria.name: toggle_and_reveal_expose_state_to_assistive_tech
criteria.description: Permission toggles expose their on/off state to assistive technology as real switch controls (e.g. role switch with a current checked state), and the reveal/hide control's accessible name reflects whether the key is currently revealed or hidden
criteria.reasoning: Permission controls exposed native checkbox checked state, and the reveal control changed its accessible name from Reveal to Hide. Evidence: permissions-shared.png

criteria.name: validation_announced_via_live_region
criteria.description: The create-identity, rename, and import validation messages are exposed through a polite ARIA live region in addition to being shown visually
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Invalid whitespace input left the polite live region empty and produced no announced validation message. Evidence: final-clean-shared.png

criteria.name: interactive_within_two_seconds
criteria.description: On a local cold load, the app renders and becomes interactive within 2 seconds
criteria.reasoning: Cold local navigation rendered the interactive dashboard in under one second. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: rapid_input_stays_coherent
criteria.description: Rapidly toggling permissions, switching identities, and undoing/redoing in quick succession produces no hangs, dropped updates, or mixed-identity states — the dashboard, Permissions view, Audit log, and export preview all settle on one coherent vault state
criteria.reasoning: BLOCKED: A complete rapid toggle/switch/undo/redo stress sequence was not directly observable end-to-end. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: outbound_network_requests_made
criteria.description: The app makes outbound network requests beyond its own origin (external fonts, icons, scripts, APIs, or simulated relay connections visible in the network log)
criteria.reasoning: No external-origin requests appeared; all observed requests were to localhost:3000. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_baseline
criteria.description: A page reload after session mutations returns the seeded identities, original active identity, original grants, and seeded theme with empty undo/redo stacks
criteria.reasoning: After mutations and reload, the app returned Personal/Studio, original active Personal, original grants, light theme, and disabled Undo/Redo. Evidence: final-baseline-shared.png

criteria.name: storage_apis_used_after_exercise
criteria.description: After exercising create, toggle, theme, export, and import, localStorage or sessionStorage is non-empty
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: After the full exercise, localStorage and sessionStorage were both empty. Evidence: export-import-shared.png

criteria.name: rotated_keys_are_fresh_bech32
criteria.description: After a confirmed rotation, the identity's npub and nsec are well-formed bech32 values (npub1/nsec1 prefixes) distinct from its prior pair and from every other identity's keys
criteria.reasoning: Confirmed rotation produced a distinct npub1/nsec1 pair; the revealed rotated pair was well-formed and different from the prior pair. Evidence: rotated-keys-revealed-shared.png

criteria.name: matrix_desyncs_from_pills
criteria.description: After any single or bulk grant action, a matrix cell and the same identity-application pill or Permissions toggle disagree about granted versus revoked
criteria.reasoning: The granted Snort state matched the Permissions checkbox, Dashboard pill, and matrix cell. Evidence: permissions-shared.png

criteria.name: technical_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable technical, performance, or accessibility defect that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (console line, network entry, element, page state) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: No additional significant defect was observed beyond criteria already covering validation/accessibility behavior. Evidence: final-clean-shared.png

criteria.name: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Create flow: submitting a valid identity label adds a card, increments the identity-count tile by one, activates the new identity on the dashboard, and includes it in the Export vault JSON preview
criteria.reasoning: Created QA Alpha; it became active, the dashboard count increased to 3, and the live export showed QA Alpha. Evidence: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation
criteria.description: Create flow: empty, whitespace-only, or over-40-character labels trigger inline validation naming the label field and add no identity
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Whitespace-only input left Create identity disabled and showed only helper text, not inline validation. Evidence: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation-shared.png

criteria.name: rename_flow_updates_related_displays
criteria.description: Rename flow: a valid rename updates the card label, the dashboard nickname when active, and the matching label in the Export vault JSON preview without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Renamed QA Alpha to Renamed Alpha; the dashboard and export JSON updated immediately without reload. Evidence: rename_flow_updates_related_displays-shared.png

criteria.name: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Delete flow: confirming delete on a non-sole identity removes the card, decreases the identity count by one, and drops the identity from the export preview
criteria.reasoning: Deleted Studio; the export preview showed 2 identities and no Studio entry, with a deletion notification. Evidence: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: view_switch_retains_vault_state
criteria.description: View switch: navigating Dashboard, Identities, Permissions, Audit log, and Settings retains the same active identity, grants, and export-preview vault contents
criteria.reasoning: Visited all five destinations; active identity, grants, and vault JSON remained consistent. Evidence: view_switch_retains_vault_state-shared.png

criteria.name: search_empty_state_and_clear
criteria.description: Edge: a search that matches no identities shows an empty state with a clear-search control that restores every card
criteria.reasoning: A nonmatching search displayed an empty state and Clear search restored all cards. Evidence: search_and_sort_update_grid-shared.png

criteria.name: search_and_sort_update_grid
criteria.description: Search and sort: search narrows cards and Label A–Z versus Label Z–A reverses order from the live collection
criteria.reasoning: Search narrowed the grid and Label Z–A reversed the live identity order. Evidence: search_and_sort_update_grid-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_collapse_preserves_workflow
criteria.description: At 768px and below the sidebar collapses to a compact nav that still reaches all five destinations without losing the active identity
criteria.reasoning: At 768px the sidebar became compact navigation; reopening it exposed all five destinations and navigation preserved the active identity. Evidence: sidebar_collapse_preserves_workflow-shared.png

criteria.name: delete_and_import_dialogs_support_cancel
criteria.description: Delete and import confirmations can be cancelled without mutating identities, grants, theme, or the export preview
criteria.reasoning: Delete and backup-import dialogs both exposed Cancel controls, and cancellation left the collection unchanged. Evidence: failed_import_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: failed_import_recovers_without_reload
criteria.description: Recovery: a rejected import shows a field-named error and leaves the vault usable without a reload
criteria.reasoning: Invalid backup JSON produced the field-named error “document: malformed JSON” while the identity grid remained usable. Evidence: failed_import_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: export_import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Export then import round-trip: after a create or grant toggle, importing the exported vault JSON restores dashboard, Identities, Permissions, theme, and export preview to the pre-export mutated state including version nostrpass-vault-v1
criteria.reasoning: Exported the vault, changed theme to dark, imported the observed nostrpass-vault-v1 JSON, and confirmed the vault returned to the prior identities, grants, active identity, theme, and preview state. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: undo_after_rename_or_delete_flow
criteria.description: Rename then Undo restores the prior label on card, dashboard, and export preview; delete then Undo restores the identity with the same npub and grants
criteria.reasoning: Undo restored the prior Third One label after rename and restored deleted Personal/Renamed Alpha identities with their original npubs and grants. Evidence: backup_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: primary_flows_unavailable_from_ui
criteria.description: Create, rename, delete, select, permission toggle, export, or import are not enabled from the UI.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The UI visibly provides create, rename, delete, select, permission, export, import, and undo/redo controls. Evidence: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: new_items_missing_or_duplicated
criteria.description: New identities fail to show up or duplicate on create.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The created identity appeared exactly once in the collection and export, with the count increasing by one. Evidence: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces-shared.png

criteria.name: state_changes_desync_displays
criteria.description: Permission or active-identity changes are not synced across dashboard, Permissions, and export preview.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Permission and active-identity changes were reflected across dashboard, Permissions, and export preview. Evidence: view_switch_retains_vault_state-shared.png

criteria.name: view_switch_breaks_or_loses_selection
criteria.description: View switching breaks layout or loses the active identity selection.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Switching views retained the selected active identity and usable layout. Evidence: view_switch_retains_vault_state-shared.png

criteria.name: blocked_last_delete_still_removes
criteria.description: Deleting the last remaining identity still removes it or leaves the UI broken.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The last identity’s Delete control was disabled and the UI explicitly stated that at least one identity must remain. Evidence: backup_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: filtered_views_disagree
criteria.description: Search results disagree with the cards actually shown.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Search results and displayed cards matched throughout filtering and clearing. Evidence: search_and_sort_update_grid-shared.png

criteria.name: collapsed_chrome_cannot_reopen
criteria.description: Collapsed sidebar cannot be re-opened to reach destinations.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: The compact navigation reopened successfully and exposed all destinations. Evidence: sidebar_collapse_preserves_workflow-shared.png

criteria.name: overlay_blocks_navigation
criteria.description: Delete, import, or export overlays block navigation with no exit option.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Export/import overlays had visible close or cancel controls and were dismissible. Evidence: failed_import_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: failed_flow_lacks_feedback
criteria.description: A failed create, rename, or import provides no user feedback.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Invalid import showed explicit field-level feedback, and mutations produced notifications. Evidence: failed_import_recovers_without_reload-shared.png

criteria.name: navigation_dead_end_requires_reload
criteria.description: A NostrPass flow leaves a dead end that requires a full page reload to continue.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Navigation and recovery continued without a full-page reload. Evidence: view_switch_retains_vault_state-shared.png

criteria.name: rotation_flow_chain
criteria.description: Rotation flow: note the active npub, Rotate keys, confirm; dashboard npub and nsec change, the vault export shows the new npub, and the top audit entry names the rotation with shortened old and new npubs; Undo restores the noted npub everywhere; Redo reapplies the rotation
criteria.reasoning: Rotated Third One keys, observed the new npub in the dashboard and export, saw the audit entry with shortened old/new npubs, then Undo restored the old npub and Redo reapplied the new one. Evidence: rotation_flow_chain-shared.png

criteria.name: bulk_grant_flow_chain
criteria.description: Bulk grant flow: with at least three identities, Grant all in one application's column flips that application to granted for every identity, updates the active identity's dashboard pill and connected-app tile, and records one audit entry naming the application and count; one Undo restores every prior grant
criteria.reasoning: Grant all for Damus changed every identity, updated the active dashboard grant state, recorded one bulk audit entry, and Undo restored prior grants. Evidence: bulk_grant_flow_chain-shared.png

criteria.name: backup_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Backup flow: Export backup for a non-active identity, Copy or Download the JSON, delete that identity, then Import backup with the same JSON; the identity card returns with identical label, npub, nsec, and grants and the identity count is restored
criteria.reasoning: Exported Renamed Alpha’s backup, deleted it, imported the same JSON, and restored its label, npub, nsec, grants, and collection count. Evidence: backup_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: audit_filter_flow
criteria.description: Audit filter flow: after at least one permission toggle and one rotation, filtering the Audit log to the rotation type shows only rotation entries, and returning to All restores the full list in the same order
criteria.reasoning: The Key rotation filter displayed only the rotation entry; returning to All restored the full ordered history. Evidence: audit_filter_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: rotation_or_bulk_controls_noop
criteria.description: Rotate keys, a matrix cell switch, or Grant all/Revoke all is missing or activating it changes no visible grant or key state.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rotate keys changed the displayed npub, and Grant all changed every Damus matrix cell and audit state. Evidence: bulk_grant_flow_chain-shared.png

criteria.name: backup_import_applies_partially
criteria.description: A rejected or conflicting backup import still mutates the collection, or a valid backup import adds an identity missing its label, keys, or grants.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: Rejected backup JSON did not mutate the collection, and valid backup import restored complete label, keys, and grants. Evidence: backup_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: user_flows_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable defect in critical end-to-end user flows that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. 'Significant' means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the defect is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.
criteria.reasoning: FAIL: No additional significant browser-observable defect outside the covered criteria was observed. Evidence: export_import_round_trip_flow-shared.png

criteria.name: sidebar_shell_with_vault_brand
criteria.description: A persistent left sidebar holds a small vault brand mark and a vertical navigation list of Dashboard, Identities, Permissions, Audit log, and Settings with the active item visually distinct
criteria.reasoning: yes — Persistent branded sidebar with all five navigation items and active-state styling. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: consistent_icon_set
criteria.description: Navigation items, stat tiles, and permission rows each carry icons from one consistent icon set with no mixed icon styles across views
criteria.reasoning: yes — Navigation, stat tiles, application rows, and controls use a consistent outlined icon style. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: dashboard_identity_card_anatomy
criteria.description: The dashboard renders a single identity card with Active identity label, nickname, Key ready badge, monospace public-key surface with Copy npub, monospace masked private-key surface with reveal/hide, and Granted/Revoked pill badges for the four apps
criteria.reasoning: yes — Dashboard visibly includes the active identity card, key surfaces, copy/reveal controls, and four app grant badges. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: stat_tiles_present
criteria.description: Below the identity card, three compact stat tiles show identity count, connected-app count, and audit-entry count
criteria.reasoning: yes — Three compact tiles show identities, connected apps, and audit entries. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: identities_grid_and_toolbar
criteria.description: Identities view shows a responsive card grid with search, sort, Undo/Redo, and Export vault controls; the active card is highlighted with an Active badge
criteria.reasoning: yes — Identities view has search, sort, undo/redo, import/export/new controls, card grid, and active badge. Evidence: identities-desktop.png

criteria.name: permissions_panel_rows
criteria.description: Permissions view shows a panel naming the active identity with one row per application including a switch-style toggle
criteria.reasoning: yes — Permissions view names Personal and shows one switch-style row for each application. Evidence: permissions-desktop.png

criteria.name: audit_entries_show_timestamps
criteria.description: Audit log entries render reverse-chronologically with timestamps
criteria.reasoning: yes — Audit log shows a recorded entry with a visible time and action-type filter. Evidence: audit-desktop.png

criteria.name: export_drawer_monospace_preview
criteria.description: The Export vault drawer shows a monospaced JSON preview with Copy, Download, and Import vault controls
criteria.reasoning: yes — Export vault drawer shows JSON preview plus Copy JSON, Download, and Import vault controls. Evidence: export-drawer.png

criteria.name: both_themes_fully_styled
criteria.description: Dark and light theme surfaces are both fully styled for backgrounds, text, borders, and badges
criteria.reasoning: yes — Dark dashboard and light settings surfaces both have styled backgrounds, text, borders, controls, and badges. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png; settings-light.png

criteria.name: monospace_for_keys_and_export
criteria.description: Monospace type is used for npub/nsec surfaces and the vault JSON preview; other UI uses the default sans type
criteria.reasoning: yes — npub/nsec surfaces and JSON previews visibly use monospace styling while surrounding UI uses sans typography. Evidence: export-drawer.png

criteria.name: control_state_treatments_both_themes
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, and toggles show distinct default, hover, focus (visible ring), and disabled treatments in both themes
criteria.reasoning: yes — Observed distinct default and hover button colors, visible keyboard focus outline, disabled Undo/Redo, and styled controls across dark/light surfaces. Evidence: settings-light.png; dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: typography_has_clear_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography shows a clear hierarchy: vault brand and view titles larger than card nicknames, which are larger than meta and key labels
criteria.reasoning: yes — Brand and page titles are visibly larger than card nicknames, with meta labels and key labels smaller. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: sidebar_collapses_on_mobile
criteria.description: At 768px and below the sidebar collapses to a compact navigation control
criteria.reasoning: yes — At 375px the sidebar becomes a compact header with an Open navigation control. Evidence: identities-mobile-375-final.png

criteria.name: identities_grid_single_column_at_375
criteria.description: At 375px width the Identities grid is a single column
criteria.reasoning: yes — At 375px identity cards stack vertically in one column. Evidence: identities-mobile-375-final.png

criteria.name: content_overflows_viewport_at_375
criteria.description: At 375px width content clips or forces page-level horizontal scrolling because npub/nsec or vault JSON overflow their surfaces
criteria.reasoning: yes — At 375px long npub code has scrollWidth greater than its client width and is clipped within the surface. Evidence: identities-mobile-375-final.png

criteria.name: generic_unstyled_dashboard
criteria.description: The surface reads as a generic unstyled dashboard or starter page rather than a security-focused identity vault
criteria.reasoning: no — The rendered surface is clearly a styled security-focused identity vault, not a generic starter dashboard. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: permissions_matrix_table_anatomy
criteria.description: The All identities matrix renders as a table with one nickname-labelled row per identity, one column per application, switch cells at every intersection, and Grant all and Revoke all controls in the column headers; when wider than its panel it scrolls inside the panel
criteria.reasoning: yes — All identities matrix is rendered as a table with identity rows, application columns, switch cells, and Grant all/Revoke all header controls. Evidence: permissions-desktop.png

criteria.name: rotate_control_on_cards_and_dashboard
criteria.description: Each identity card and the dashboard carry a Rotate keys control alongside Select, Rename, and Delete, opening a confirmation dialog that names the identity
criteria.reasoning: yes — Identity cards and dashboard expose Rotate keys controls; activating one opens a confirmation dialog naming Personal. Evidence: rotate-confirmation.png

criteria.name: backup_surface_with_qr_placeholder
criteria.description: The Export backup surface pairs a monospaced single-identity JSON preview with Copy and Download and a square QR-style tile visibly labelled as a placeholder
criteria.reasoning: yes — Export backup dialog pairs a monospaced single-identity JSON preview with Copy JSON, Download, and a square QR-style placeholder. Evidence: backup-dialog.png

criteria.name: audit_filter_control_in_toolbar
criteria.description: The Audit log toolbar carries an action-type filter control offering All plus one choice per recorded action type
criteria.reasoning: yes — Audit toolbar includes an Action type control with All and recorded action choices. Evidence: audit-desktop.png

criteria.name: visual_design_catchall
criteria.description: The app exhibits a significant, browser-observable visual design defect that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. Significant means it would plausibly matter to a real user, not a nitpick. If present, name the defect and cite the concrete evidence. If already covered by another criterion in this file, answer no here.
criteria.reasoning: no — No additional significant browser-observable visual defect was found beyond the criteria already covered. Evidence: dashboard-desktop.png

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix

criteria.reasoning: The no-match state says no identities match and explains how to clear the search. Evidence: empty_states_explain_next_step-shared.png

criteria.description: Where the app renders permission descriptions and audit lines, copy is complete phrases without lorem placeholder text
